title: Christmas Candle Ring, Votive Candles with Red Berry and Pinecone Xmas Candle Ring Wreath with Candle Holders Christmas Table Centrepiece Decoration Set of 4 Red
features: 【Christmas Candle Ring】The Christmas candle ring is winter decor that features red berries, mini pinecones, and iced pine needle. Pair with votive candle holder for festive Christmas display, it’s perfect for your pillar candle, or display it as a festive wreath

【Used in Various Occasions】The Christmas candle ring with candle holder is a perfect addition to your decor. It can be displayed in dining table, kitchen, mantelpieces and fireplace, cabinet. Add Christmas atmosphere to your home, family gatherings, banquets and party
【Size】The interior of the Christmas candle ring is 2.25in/5.7cm, outer is 5.2in/13cm. The height of the holder is 2.5in/6.4cm
【Gift Box】The Xmas candle ring comes in a beautiful and festive gift box, Perfect Christmas gift for women, family and friend, or just decorate your home
【Package Include】The box contains 4 packs Christmas candle rings with votive candle holder, and the votive candle holder filled with natural soy wax, light it up and enjoy the holiday atmosphere
description: 4 Pieces Christmas Candle Ring with 4 Candle Holders Christmas Candle Rings These Christmas Candle Rings with red berries, mini pinecones, and iced pine needle is a beautiful piece that will delight for years to come. It’s perfect for creating a festive and warm Christmas ambiance, pair with our votive candle holders for a complete look.
